title: Ignacia Just for Fun
description: A small pack that adds funny features to the game
body:
# Hello There
This is a small pack that contains funny features like Darth Vaders NOOOOOOOO Scream for the warden and his breathing sound, truely sus gravel and sand:  
- pumpkin blur  
- LotR raid horn sound  
- Owi Ban goat scream  
- Darth Vader warden  
- Pumpkinblur   
- red creeper eyes
- sus gravel & sand


This pack is designed for the Ignacia SMP and purely optional.

If you have more ideas what features I could add let me know on discord!
